task_completion.description: The docker-compose.yml file is modified to include a bind mount for the src directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An editor showing docker-compose.yml with a 'volumes:' section containing '- ./src:/app' (or similar) under the service definition.

task_completion.description: The docker-compose.yml file is modified to override the command to run the Flask development server.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An editor showing docker-compose.yml with 'command: flask run --debug --host=0.0.0.0' (or as a list) under the service definition.

task_completion.description: The Docker Compose environment is started.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal showing the execution of 'docker compose up' or 'docker-compose up' and the output indicating the Flask development server is running.

task_completion.description: The src/app.py file is modified to test hot-reloading.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An editor showing src/app.py being edited (e.g., changing a route's return value or adding a print statement).

task_completion.description: The hot-reloading functionality is verified to work.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing Flask detecting a change (e.g., '* Detected change in ...', '* Restarting with stat') OR a browser/curl command showing the updated response from localhost:5000.

integrity.description: The agent actually ran Docker Compose commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal shows genuine Docker Compose output, not just simulated or echoed text.

integrity.description: The agent did not rebuild or restart the container to apply changes to app.py.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no 'docker compose build', 'docker compose up --build', or 'docker compose restart' commands executed after modifying app.py.

integrity.description: The agent edited the files properly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Files like docker-compose.yml and app.py are edited using a real text editor (nano, vim, VS Code, etc.) or standard shell commands (sed, echo) with verified contents.
